ai_summary: Panache Digilife Limited has received a tax order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, Kalyan, confirming a demand of approximately Rs. 2.22 crore, including interest and penalty, for alleged wrongful availment of Input Tax Credit. While the company strongly disputes the order and plans to appeal, stating it anticipates no material adverse impact on its financials or operations, this significant tax demand for alleged compliance issues still presents a financial risk requiring close monitoring.
